textByHash.04f7a5ecfe85778dcbda70b07cbd238cf9972b3c: What kind of question is that? How's life as a... I dunno. Whatever it is that you do for a living.
textByHash.0f04b289fc78aeb128eb12fa9b4cabf72cfdbf76: Really? You don't think a pirate would know the difference of being out at sea and being at a dock?
textByHash.18c9d6d82d4df92b4ef0724fd4d75902c1050840: You'd be surprised what an incentive for expert health care that is.
textByHash.1fae6821984425eeb61f96e3a0e87720d890ec08: You do know both of these eyes are made of glass don't you?
textByHash.21c3d15292c5440d3ce726173b8a1ece1210f391: You think this is cold? Up by Acheron it gets so cold that when you talk you see the words freeze in the air in front of you!
textByHash.24ebeb4d18eb458c51510eafdf0822ac9ac0bb16: I'm sure I know nothing about that.
textByHash.28f0c68547d084fb2d6ca6f403bf728d5777c852: In all my years as a pirate, I have never seen such sailing!
textByHash.2d1e03e96a3a5c452151fa39733f4da632b47190: Not as such. If any of us get sick we kidnap a doctor and don't let him go until we're better.
textByHash.2de1b96110c164ed01c49cf95fadb37eb1faf077: Nah, not really. I was exaggerating for humourous effect. It is very very cold though!
textByHash.2f06f96f5b0a491419a329ecb96c14c29bb780c5: That she is lad, that she is.
textByHash.397baed1d8322e10f2ff7cd119f51531fa7def63: It might be an idea for you to find out before accusing people.
textByHash.3b4b96ef9c9bd6be45aec5a0f6d9e4192b80ec63: If I was a less superstitious person, I would suggest an evil magic of some kind.
textByHash.3cb1108dfdb7280405a96f1e299f25d964dea1db: Well, I guess it could be... Seems a little strange for him to do that though.
textByHash.3e1aa65a947966d83595c594e4ed61b5e5809f10: Hello there. So what brings you aboard the Lady Zay?
textByHash.48147eea30e02a654437ab28713f74ef9d46484f: Also, please don't call me a lychee, whatever that may be.
textByHash.497e48a27257c885ea01263a9535ad842e67b081: Aye, she's a beauty alright! The Lady Zay has been my home for many hard months, through storm and sun, and she always gets us to here we were headed!
textByHash.4c07d95bf4c9b8f342dfda9ffa571ecb8405d411: Only for part of it. I was pretty drunk though. I'm not sure I remember anything but the start of the evening.
textByHash.55637017e3f98a5ad78a9312b4e792775d725c9f: Hey, whatever love. Just make sure the captain doesn't catch you, pirates don't like stowaways much.
textByHash.5bf93afa985392b4e63b4e4a9382cd90a14416d4: Sorry I don't have time to hear it then! See you around young fremennik-who-is-not-really-a-fremennik!
textByHash.6a215f74a64976e8a3582ffce403af6b07cd645a: That she is lass, that she is.
textByHash.7040b1266e80a64cf9d4b950ebd8a9a23809724b: Sorry, can't stop, the Captain will have my guts for garters if he catches me slacking off talking to the stowaway.
textByHash.80225cbdc491681670dde70df7adb802ff493f1f: Nope, can't say as I did.
textByHash.82a258264e113035287831626c8f19d2c0c020b1: It's what it says on my pay-packet at the end of the month.
textByHash.925680d51236db1c3f874c829ab67dbdb784b99c: ARGH! SOUND THE ALARM! STOWAWAY ON BOARD! STOWAWAY ON BOARD!
textByHash.9d6001e91d0a06ab9a3c1372fb9f8de816c1811b: Ah, good day to you milady! Your face is unfamiliar, did you perhaps join us aboard the ship at Lunar Isle?
textByHash.aa011eb1411c7ac0421090c4d8939a0feb1c6114: Do I look like a jinx to you?
textByHash.bb5f36a76d9b18db36d0875d1ae9fd85c1d592dc: Pretty good so far. All the grog and loot that we can plunder, plus full medical including dental.
textByHash.c8f69b720759c2c4ea0d7b6c6ac7ac8f8c514d87: My mother was a gnome. Apparently it was a very painful birth.
textByHash.d0548e996177d869e39fea691eb982916dbe0d4a: Yeah, whatever lady, it doesn't really matter who you are I'll get in trouble!
textByHash.d671e6898f88b9d589997775679421126cef08c2: Hey, whatever pal. Just make sure the captain doesn't catch you, pirates don't like stowaways much.
textByHash.d677943a4a6a209b2513cc895ea2ad50f572e11b: Please don't talk like that, it is extremely irritating.
textByHash.d69a3bdc5c2414fccbb7789e7018bbc7a0e9abe9: You must admit you do look a lot like a stowaway though.
textByHash.e42a3759ad234c8016911142aa65f11c19f57079: Yeah, whatever guy, it doesn't really matter who you are I'll get in trouble!
textByHash.e7e47833cfb7fe9eb9ff3f73724d786396320938: Best you get us on our way then!
textByHash.e986059cf8c5c59f0f2650fa9fea23d628c5576c: Oh, really? You don't look like a Fremennik to me!
textByHash.e9ee9e84be3d6ae50c289bfb7e6ce30774cff896: Ah, good day to you sirrah! Your face is unfamiliar, did you perhaps join us aboard the ship at Lunar Isle?
textByHash.f4a1bd3f94f77a4f62d714ac1c2e572a1a87de59: Erm... I've never actually met one...
textByHash.f565bdb51a59c1e3566c79fb2989067e98fe92eb: Well, at the moment it mostly involves being asked random questions by a stowaway.
